heading: Payment Processing in India
body:
If you pay with a credit card from a credit card issuer based in
India, you must complete additional payment processing
steps that comply with RBI (Reserve Bank of India) regulations.

The RBI (Reserve Bank of India) requires a *mandate* for recurring payments to ensure you
aren't charged above a certain amount each billing period. MongoDB
automatically registers a mandate for $1,400 USD (United States Dollars) each month when
you [add a payment method](add-method-payment-processing-india)
or [retry a payment](retry-payment-processing-india).
